title: tillandsia aeris-incola
intro: Tillandsia aeris-incola, also known as the Air Plant, is a species of epiphyte that grows in air without the need for soil. Native to Central and South America, this plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its high concentration of flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tillandsia aeris-incola include its ability to support respiratory health, boost the immune system, and act as an antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
